landing.title: WhatsApp Autopilot par
landing.subtitle: Chhote business ke liye sasta WhatsApp automation
landing.feature_orders: WhatsApp par orders aur bookings manage karein
landing.feature_sheets: Google Sheet edit karein, bot turant update
landing.trust: Credit card nahi chahiye · Kabhi bhi cancel
landing.hero_subtitle: Customer ko auto-reply, order lena, pickup schedule. Hindi, English, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri mein.
landing.no_card_cancel: Koi card nahi · Koi setup fee nahi · Kabhi bhi cancel
landing.reels_helper: Swipe / tap karke industry badlein. Har business ke liye wahi engine.
landing.without_whatly_desc: Raat 9 baje ke baad 30% msg miss. Customer chala jaata hai.
landing.with_whatly_desc: Bot 24×7 reply karta hai. Aap soyein, order aate rahein.
landing.uc_sub: Ek platform. Har business apni zaroorat use kare.
landing.feat_title: WhatsApp pe business chalane ke liye sab kuch
landing.feat_sub: No coding. No setup fee. No surprises.
landing.feat_reply_body: English, Hindi, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. Customer ne jo likha woh detect karta hai, usi bhasha mein reply.
landing.feat_sheets_body: Koi admin panel nahi. Sheet mein items ya FAQs add karein, bot har 15 min mein sync.
landing.feat_orders_body: Customer kahe '2 atta'. Bot parse karta hai, total banata hai, pickup time poochta hai. Cash ya UPI.
landing.feat_inbox_body: Saare customer msg phone par. Bot ko nahi pata to khud reply karein.
landing.feat_lang_body: Customer ne Hindi likhi? Hindi mein reply. Hinglish likhi? Hinglish. Automatic.
landing.feat_ai_body: ₹699/mo. Smart fallback jab FAQ match na ho. English replies customer ki bhasha mein auto.
landing.how_sub: Sign-up se pehle auto-reply tak. Koi tech skill nahi chahiye.
landing.step1_body: Phone number → WhatsApp se verify → 14-din trial. Koi card nahi.
landing.step2_body: Ek tap. Meta ka official signup. Data aapka rahega.
landing.step3_body: 12 ready templates: price, timing, location, menu wagaira. Reply edit karein, ho gaya.
landing.step4_body: Bot 24/7 customer ki bhasha mein reply karta hai. Sab inbox mein dikhta hai.
landing.price_sub: Jitna shop use kare utna do. Kabhi bhi cancel.
landing.final_title: Wahi reply baar baar likhna band karein
landing.final_sub: Ek baar setup karein. Chain se soyein. Customer ko turant reply — raat 2 baje bhi.

hook.subtitle: Wahi shop · wahi customer · alag result.

without.headline: Aaj raat 8 customer chhod ke chale gaye
without.subhead: Owner so raha hai. Phone bajta raha. Koi reply nahi.

with.headline: Owner so raha hai. Bot dukaan chala raha hai.
with.subhead: Har msg ka jawab. Order subah ke liye ready.

without.headline: Sunday: band. Booking? Woh bhi band.
without.subhead: 8 dulhan ne msg kiya. Kisi ko jawab nahi. Kahin aur chali gayi.

with.headline: Sunday chhutti, par booking aati rahi.
with.subhead: Bot sheet se slot book karta hai. Monday — calendar full.

without.headline: Kitchen + phone + delivery — kuch toh chhutega
without.subhead: Owner khana bana raha. WhatsApp bharta ja raha. Order Swiggy pe.

with.headline: Khana banao. Bot baki sab sambhalega.
with.subhead: Menu auto. UPI link auto. ETA auto-track.

signup.phone_hint: Hum WhatsApp se verify karenge — OTP type nahi karna
signup.terms_notice: Aage badhke aap Terms aur Privacy Policy se sehmat hain.

verify.title: WhatsApp se verify karein
verify.instruction: Neeche button tap karein — WhatsApp khulega, bas send dabaayein.
verify.wrong_number: Galat number? Phir se shuru karein

onboarding.business_title: Apne business ke baare mein batayein
onboarding.business_subtitle: 30 second. Baad mein change kar sakte hain.
onboarding.languages_label: Customer kaun si languages use karte hain
onboarding.languages_hint: Auto-reply sabhi chuni hui languages mein kaam karega
onboarding.whatsapp_subtitle: Meta WhatsApp Business link karein taki hum auto-reply bhej sakein.
onboarding.intents_subtitle: 12 aam sawalon ke jawab pehle se bhare hain. Edit ya off karein.
onboarding.save_and_finish: Save karein aur Setup poora karein
onboarding.done_subtitle: {name} autopilot par WhatsApp messages lene ko taiyaar.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.session_expired: 24h window khatam. Template message bhejein (jald aa raha).

sheets.title: Google Sheets
sheets.subtitle: Sheet edit karein → bot turant update
sheets.step_1: FAQs / menu / services ke saath Google Sheet banayein
sheets.step_2: Hamare service account ko view access dein
sheets.step_4: Sheet kabhi bhi edit karein — har 15 min auto-sync
sheets.empty_hint: FAQs, menu ya services auto-sync ke liye Google Sheet connect karein.
sheets.service_account_body: Pehle sheet ko service account ke saath share karein (Viewer access):
sheets.url_hint: Browser address bar se copy karein
sheets.tab_hint: Sheet mein neeche ka tab naam
sheets.auto_sync_hint: Nayi rows apne aap sync karein
